anti_pattern_payload.canonical_unwind_path: Choose ONE high-quality entropy coder (brotli q=11 standalone) OR replace LZMA with an ORTHOGONAL coder (ANS over distinct symbol space). Do NOT chain LZMA after brotli.
anti_pattern_payload.description: Chaining LZMA over an already-brotli-compressed byte stream yields a saturated ratio (~1.001). The two entropy coders operate on overlapping redundancy domains so the second pass produces near-zero additional savings while adding decode-side complexity + format-coupling risk.
anti_pattern_payload.forbidden_pattern_predicate: compression_pipeline.contains(brotli) AND compression_pipeline.contains(lzma) AND lzma.order > brotli.order

decoder pipeline chains lzma decode after brotli decode

anti_pattern_payload.canonical_unwind_path: Canonical order: SVD/low-rank FIRST (lossless rank reduction preserves residual structure) -> quantization (int8 OR FP4 per-factor) SECOND -> entropy coding THIRD.
anti_pattern_payload.description: Applying SVD (low-rank decomposition) to a tensor that has ALREADY been quantized (int8 / FP4 / etc.) corrupts the rank-N residual because quantization noise dominates the low-rank energy structure.
